description: Baseline fixture: skills/container-security/checklists/dockerfile_hardening.yaml lists dkr-healthcheck-defined as a required check, but the Go-side dockerfile scanner does not currently implement it. A hardened image with no HEALTHCHECK should therefore clear every existing scanner pass with zero findings. The fixture exists (a) as a control to confirm the scanner does not regress and (b) as a placeholder for the day the HEALTHCHECK rule is reviewed in.
